news.title: Fourth-quarter GDP revised down to just 0.7% growth; January core inflation was 3.1%
news.summary: The PCE price index for January was expected to show headline inflation at 2.9% and core at 3.1%. The PCE is the price index used to measure inflation in the United States.

news.title: Pete Hegseth on Strait of Hormuz: 'Don't need to worry about it'
news.summary: The Strait of Hormuz is the world's most critical chokepoint for oil shipments. It has been effectively closed since the U.S. and Israel began the war on Iran.

news.title: Oil holds near $100 as Trump says America has 'ammunition, and plenty of time’ to fight Iran war
news.summary: WTI crude saw its biggest weekly gain since the 1980s last week. WTI crude was up more than 6% last week, the biggest weekly rise since the mid-1980s.

news.title: Four crew killed in U.S. refueling plane that crashed in Iraq, Pentagon says
news.summary: The U.S. Central Command said that the loss was "not due to hostile or enemy fire" The loss was not due to "hostile or enemy" fire, it said.

news.title: U.S. launches fresh Section 301 probes into 60 economies over forced-labor trade practices
news.summary: The forced-labor probes follow Section 301 investigations launched on Wednesday. The Section 301 probes target excess industrial capacity across more than a dozen economies.

news.title: GDP grew at a tepid 0.7% pace in the fourth quarter. The future is foggy, too.
news.summary: The U.S. Iran conflict and the Supreme Court’s tariff ruling add to uncertainty around the economy. The Supreme Court's tariff ruling and the Iran conflict add to the uncertainty.

news.title: Chip makers face a looming shortage of a key ingredient if the Iran conflict drags on
news.summary: Qatar accounts for a third of global helium supply. But it has halted production of the gas, which is essential for semiconductor manufacturing.

news.title: 11 stocks to harden your portfolio against Iran risk
news.summary: Focus on stocks that are stable when investors flee to safety and stock-market liquidity dries up. Focus on stocks with strong fundamentals.

news.title: Shoppers seeking a tariff refund from retailers are likely out of luck
news.summary: A new lawsuit alleges that Costco owes shoppers refunds for tariffs. Experts say that’s a tough call. The lawsuit was filed in federal court in California.

news.title: Trump is scrambling to quell the rise of $100 oil. But the market keeps circling one cure.
news.summary: Other efforts to coax oil down prices — now at $100 a barrel — are like putting a Band-Aid on a shotgun wound, says analyst.
